library.emptyHint: Tap the + button to import your first book
library.importSourceSubtitle: Bring books into this shelf from local files or a remote WebDAV library.
library.importSourceLocalDesc: Pick EPUB, PDF, TXT, and other supported files from this device.
library.importSourceSavedWebDavDesc: Browse your remote library with the WebDAV credentials you already saved.
library.importSourceSavedWebDavMissing: You don't have a usable WebDAV setup yet. Connect your library in Sync settings first.
library.importSourceSavedWebDavMissingTitle: No WebDAV library is ready yet
library.importSourceSavedWebDavMissingSecret: We found the WebDAV address, but the password is missing. Save the Sync settings again and then come back.
library.importSourceTemporaryWebDavDesc: Use another WebDAV just for this import without changing your current sync setup.
library.importRemoteRootHint: You can enter any nested path. Leave it blank to start from the WebDAV service base directory.
library.webdavImportRemoteRootPlaceholder: Leave blank to start from the server base directory
library.importAllowInsecureHint: Helpful for self-signed certificates or plain HTTP servers, though HTTPS is still recommended.
library.webdavImportFolderDone: Importable books from this folder have been added to your library.
library.webdavImportSelectedDone: The selected books have been imported into your library.
library.webdavImportNoImportableTitle: There are no importable books in this folder yet
library.webdavImportNoImportableDesc: Try another folder, or keep drilling down into the library.
library.webdavImportLoadingDesc: Preparing this folder so you can start picking books in a moment.
library.webdavImportBrowserSubtitle: Browse the remote folders and pick books for this shelf.
library.webdavImportEmptyFolder: This folder is empty right now
library.webdavImportNoSearchResultsDesc: Try a different keyword, or go up a level and look for books elsewhere.
library.webdavImportEmptyFolderDesc: Browse another directory, or switch to another source and keep exploring.
library.webdavImportUnsupported: This file type is not supported yet
library.webdavImportReady: Pick a few books to bring into this shelf
library.webdavImportSelectionHint: Keep selecting, or import what you've already picked
library.webdavImportFolderHint: {{count}} importable here, {{duplicates}} may already be in your library
library.deleteBookDescription: The book file will be removed from your shelf.
library.preserveDeleteDataHint: Can be restored when you re-import the same book
library.downloadNotFound: This book's file is not on the remote — the source device may have failed to upload it. Reopen/sync the book on that device, or re-import it here.
library.passwordNotFound: Sync password not found — please reconfigure
library.detailsDesc: Edit the metadata ReadAny uses for library display, search, and sync naming.
library.detailsListPlaceholder: Separate with commas, ideographic commas, or new lines
library.detailsProgressHint: Keep metadata complete so notes and search stay easier to use.
library.detailsReviewPlaceholder: Write your thoughts about this book
library.detailsManagedMetadataNote: ReadAny maintains this metadata for library display, search, and sync naming. The original book file is not modified.

home.emptyLibrary: Your library is empty, import books to start reading
home.vec_reindexConfirm: This book is already indexed. Re-indexing will reset the existing data. Continue?
